subject: Desktop Warp status update
body:
Hi all,

A quick note to say we're stretched thin right now and as a result are not
able to support the desktop version of Warp.

Here is a working link to an installer as some people have requested it.
https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/l7iyg9bhivkp3jdqghs9x/Warp_20200114.msi?rlkey=58qp5d2axp1bc3f0nkafpu9pn&e=1&st=6dst1ohi&dl=0

Many bugs have been found/fixed since 2020 and if you choose to use this
old version it has to be with the understanding that it is unsupported and
you're on your own.

Cheers,

Alister
